message:
Modernize navigation and component styling

Apply cleaner, more modern styling to navigation components:
- Navbar uses bottom border indicator instead of filled backgrounds
- Sidebar topics use left border indicator with no background fills
- Footer links use underline hover style per brand guidelines
- Reference cards have subtle lift animation on hover
- Breadcrumbs and mobile menu toggle updated for consistency
- Table of contents uses left border for nested items

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
